Committee: Veterans, Homeland Security And Military Affairs

Milestones.Committee: Veterans, Homeland Security And Military Affairs

Actions.Text: REFERRED TO VETERANS, HOMELAND SECURITY AND MILITARY AFFAIRS

Title: Expands the veterans' services commission
Summary: Expands the veterans' services commission to include two additional members and several additional ex officio members.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the veterans' services law, in relation to expanding the veterans' services commission
